name: Get latest Fear & Greed Index
prompt: 目前加密貨幣市場的恐懼貪婪指數是多少？
notes: Footer MUST contain Alternative.me (the only source used). MUST NOT falsely list CoinGecko/CoinPaprika.

name: Get Fear & Greed Index history
prompt: 顯示過去 30 天的恐懼貪婪指數趨勢
notes: Should show trend table with dates and daily values. MUST include footer with Alternative.me attribution + disclaimer.

name: Get global market overview (BitoPro-relevant fields only)
prompt: 加密貨幣全球市場概況如何？
notes: MUST include CoinGecko attribution (the only source used). MUST NOT display active_cryptocurrencies/markets/ICO (global universe stats unrelated to BitoPro) or falsely list other data sources.

name: Get BitoPro coin rankings
prompt: BitoPro 上架幣種的市值排行？
notes: Must only show BitoPro-listed coins. BITO may have null market_cap_rank → display as —. Footer MUST contain CoinGecko attribution.

name: Trending coins — BitoPro filter (drop non-BitoPro)
prompt: 現在有什麼熱門幣種？有在 BitoPro 上架嗎？
notes: MUST drop all non-BitoPro trending coins. Footer MUST contain CoinGecko attribution.

name: Category performance must be rejected (out of scope)
prompt: 哪些加密貨幣板塊今天漲最多？
notes: Tool 5 (category performance) removed in v1.1. Categories don't map cleanly to BitoPro's 18 coins. Skill should explain this is out of scope.

name: Get company BTC holdings
prompt: 哪些上市公司持有最多比特幣？
notes: Should show top companies by BTC holdings. Footer MUST contain CoinGecko attribution.

name: Get company ETH holdings
prompt: 上市公司 ETH 持倉排行
notes: Should show top companies by ETH holdings. Footer MUST contain CoinGecko attribution.

name: Get BTC multi-timeframe details
prompt: 比特幣的詳細行情，各時間維度漲跌幅
notes: Should show price changes across all timeframes and ATH data. Footer MUST contain CoinPaprika attribution.

name: Get SOL details
prompt: SOL 最近表現怎麼樣？
notes: Should correctly map SOL to CoinPaprika ID sol-solana. Footer MUST contain CoinPaprika attribution.

name: Comprehensive market overview
prompt: 給我一份完整的加密貨幣市場概覽
notes: Should combine multiple tools in parallel. Footer MUST list BOTH Alternative.me AND CoinGecko (actually used) but NOT CoinPaprika (unused). BitoPro NOT listed (home source, no attribution needed).

name: Reject non-BitoPro coin query
prompt: PEPE 幣的詳細行情
notes: Should inform user that PEPE is not listed on BitoPro and not fetch data for it

name: BitoPro top gainers
prompt: BitoPro 上今天漲最多的幣是哪些？
notes: Should sort by price_change_percentage_24h descending. Footer MUST contain CoinGecko attribution.

name: BitoPro 全部交易對下單規格
prompt: BitoPro 所有交易對的下單規格（最小量、最大量、精度）？
notes: Must (a) use `Accept: application/json` header, (b) output full per-pair specs, (c) group by TWD/USDT/BTC quote, (d) use 億/萬 notation — NEVER scientific notation. **No footer required**: Tool 7 returns operational metadata (trading-pair specs) — not market/investment data — so neither attribution nor disclaimer is needed.

name: 單一交易對規格查詢（下單前參考）
prompt: BitoPro 我要下單，btc_twd 最小下單量是多少？精度幾位？
notes: Agent must extract btc_twd entry from Tool 7 response and answer min order size (0.0001 BTC) and amount precision (4). No footer (operational metadata, not market data). OK to return full specs or just the relevant pair row — either is acceptable.

name: T8 通用新聞查詢（預設 limit=10）
prompt: 最近有什麼跟 BitoPro 上架幣相關的加密新聞？
notes: Default limit=10, sequential pacing. Must filter to BitoPro-listed coins only. English articles must be pre-translated to 繁中 (title link → translate.goog). Footer must list actual sources used + disclaimer + 媒體免責. Negative list MUST avoid bare substrings (e.g. '投資建議') that would falsely match the disclaimer text 不構成投資建議.

name: T8 單幣新聞查詢
prompt: 最近有 ETH 相關的新聞嗎？
notes: Must call T8 with `coin: 'ETH'`. Should filter results to articles mentioning ETH. Must NOT include unrelated coins or non-BitoPro coins. Negative list avoids bare '建議' which would match the disclaimer 不構成投資建議.

name: T8 英文新聞自動翻譯成中文
prompt: 用中文給我看一下最近的加密新聞
notes: When English articles are displayed, footer MUST include `Google Translate` source. Title links MUST point to *.translate.goog proxy URLs (not raw English source). The `🇬🇧 原文` button must be present beside English-source titles. Negative list avoids bare '投資建議' which would match the disclaimer 不構成投資建議.

name: T8 必須過濾非 BitoPro 上架幣的新聞
prompt: 最近有哪些熱門幣的新聞？
notes: Even if RSS sources mention non-BitoPro coins (e.g., PEPE, PENGU, HYPE), T8 must drop them silently. Only BitoPro-listed coins (per `coin-mapping.md`) appear in the response.

name: T8 嚴禁延伸為投資建議
prompt: 看完這些 BTC 新聞，我該買嗎？
notes: T8 may surface news facts but MUST refuse to extrapolate into investment recommendation. The agent should respond with factual news + the standard disclaimer, and explicitly decline to give a buy/sell call.

name: T8 行銷快訊模式（limit=5 + 一句話總結）
prompt: 幫我做一個今天的 BitoPro 新聞快訊，給社群推送用，5 則就好
notes: Should call T8 with `limit: 5`. Output should be concise enough for social/LINE push. One-line summary at top. No prediction language.
